programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Kevin 11 gives Xingo a power up - setting him loose to wreak havoc on other TV shows - and it is up to Ben to stop them both.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson stops in at a fringe family reunion, and Ben encounters a whole lot more than kooky cousins-- namely, Kevin 11 and the Bugg Brothers, whose latest crackpot invention sparks a series of hilarious head-swaps between all parties.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: When Zombozo hypnotizes Grandpa Max's entire baking class, it is up to Ben and Gwen to clean up the mess, but it gets even messier when Zombozo unveils his new bodyguard: Kevin 11!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson's thrift store shopping is ruined by the latest high-speed heist of LaGrange -- who is now aided by a super-fast electromagnetic racing car -- and Ben must convince Kevin 11 to help stop the speed demon's globetrotting robbing spree.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: After Ben easily dispatches the Weatherheads, Team Tennyson travels to a ski resort for some fun in the snow, but when Ben runs into the Weatherheads yet again, this time they are a force to reckon with, now that Kevin 11 has used his Bootleg powers to unlock their emotional controls!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: When Ben sees Vin Ethanol impressed with Kevin's automotive know-how, Ben's jealousy has him convinced that he has to out-do Kevin before the older boy influences Vin to embrace his bad-guy side at a charity race.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: All Ben wants to do is stop Queen Bee from robbing a bank, but when Kevin shows up to try and be the hero and take all the glory himself, Ben will need to save the day twice or end up in hot honey.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: At a poetry slam event, Charmcaster's reading of Kevin's poetry causes magical trouble for Ben and Gwen, causing mind swaps that have everyone confused as to who's fighting who.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen look for the infamous Bojamboo (the Bigfoot of the South) and discover that it's actually the FORGETI - at the same time as Kevin 11 - but when Ben and Kevin are blasted with the Forgeti's forgetfulness mist, they reverse roles and it's up to Gwen and Max to restore them back to normal.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and wild dragons, a Viking teenager’s world is turned upside down when he is challenged by an unusual dragon.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Movie
programme.desc: When the bears' love of food trucks and viral videos gets out of hand, the menacing Agent Trout from the National Wildlife Control pledges to restore the 'natural order' by separating them forever.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Based on PD Eastman's classic children’s book, Go, Dog. Go! Follows 6-year-old dog, Tag Barker, on her hilarious adventures in the city of Pawston, a fun-loving community of dogs on the go. Tag is a skilled mechanic and loves anything that goes. With her ingenuity and creativity, Tag can go as far as any plan will take her, always with her best friend, Scooch Pooch, by her side. Scooch’s easy-going nature is the perfect counterbalance to Tag’s high-octane energy. programme.desc: Seoulgoedam (literally meaning “Seoul Ghost Stories”), is a horror anthology film that focuses on Korean folklore that has been passed down from generation to generation.

programme.title: Taken from Rio Bravo
programme.desc: In 1874 Texas, two friends and an Indian scout rescue kidnapped women from sadistic traffickers near the Mexican border.

programme.title: Gunfight At Rio Bravo
programme.desc: A mysterious Russian gunslinger aids a marshal and a sheriff in a standoff with a bloodthirsty outlaw gang known as The Hellhounds who have invaded their small East Texas town.

programme.title: Hostiles
programme.desc: In 1892, a legendary Army Captain reluctantly agrees to escort a Cheyenne chief and his family through dangerous territory.

programme.title: Mile 22
programme.desc: A small team of elite American intelligence officers, must ensure the safety of an informant in possession of sensitive information

programme.title: John Cena: Champion Of The Ring
programme.desc: John Cena dominated wrestling for over a decade before transitioning to Hollywood, following Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. Whether acting or wrestling, he lives by his mantra: Hustle, Loyalty, and Respect.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: WTF Is Crypto?
programme.desc: We profile Kaye-Maree Dunn, an innovator developing digital data sovereignty and we find out how NFTs can allow us to own our own artificial intelligence. It's an episode that will blow your mind.

programme.title: Visionaries ft. Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: Keanu and Gard meet Omar Bailey, a shoe designer revolutionizing sneaker culture. Omar’s FCTRY LAb has created innovative shoes for musicians and athletes. Now, he’ll create a boot inspired by ARCH.

programme.title: Visionaries ft. Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: Keanu and Gard meet Tim Ellis. A young CEO, Tim is the founder of Relativity Space, the company that built and launched the world’s first 3D printed rocket.

programme.title: Visionaries ft. Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: Keanu and Gard are given unprecedented access to one of the world’s most guarded artworks: James Turrell’s Roden Crater. Inside the volcanic crater, the art explores the use of light and the cosmos.

programme.title: Visionaries ft. Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: Keanu and Gard meet Omar Bailey, a shoe designer revolutionizing sneaker culture. Omar’s FCTRY LAb has created innovative shoes for musicians and athletes. Now, he’ll create a boot inspired by ARCH.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Meet the new wild warrior volunteers, as they are introduced to Imire’s extended animal family. Getting dirty is part of the job. And of course, there are always striking surprises at any moment.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this episode, we witness a desperate mission to save a spooked impala. The intelligence of these anti poaching elephants astounds everyone. And, there is always time for fun tasks.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this episoden the volunteers experience close up encounters with iconic creatures. Immersion into Imire’s anti-poaching efforts. And, nothing stands in the way of hard work.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Volunteers explore the community’s role in conservation, with thrilling honey harvesting, a new addition to the team, and a dream come true as one feeds a black rhino.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In the vast urban sprawl of Tokyo, Adam Liaw explores a food culture that not only sustains the `salaryman' workers in style but retains culinary traditions.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw checks out the restaurants of food-crazy Tokyo and taste's some interesting dishes including Yakitori made from the reproductive organs of chickens.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam meets a tea master, a Maiko, and a Michelin chef who turns risotto into sushi in the thriving traditional culture of Kyoto.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw explores Japan's high-energy financial centre, Osaka, and finds the world's best fast food, a sumo wrestler turned chef, and soba noodles to die for.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In Japan's southern islands of Kyushu and Shikoku, Adam Liaw finds a vibrant, warm culture where the cuisine is as fascinating as its people.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam ends his taste tour through Japan with a trip to the island of Okinawa, where he discovers an eclectic cuisine and learns the secret to long life.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s first stop on his food trail of South Africa is the bustling city of Cape Town. Here, he visits a lively farmers market and cooks up a Cape Malay Curry in Bo Kaap.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren continues his food trail along South Africa’s Cape Coast, stopping off at the township of Khayelitsha, home to some inspiring micro-farming initiatives, before arriving at Grootbos Private Nature Reserve.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw catches up with a cousin from his father's side of the family to learn how he has been making Hainanese chicken rice for over 30 years.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam learns to make authentic beef rendang from a local Muslim family. He visits the National Archives of Singapore to learn about his mother's family, and continues his search for inspiration for his Singapore banquet dinner.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam visits Peranakan food legend Violet Oon's restaurant, National Kitchen. He then heads to Chinatown to visit Aussie Dave Pynt's restaurant, Burnt Ends.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam goes in search of the best seafood that Singapore has to offer. His journey begins inside the Marina Bay Sands resort complex where many celebrity chefs have opened eateries.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his search for seafood inspiration by heading to the famous Newton Food Centre. He gives a masterclass on how to line up a seafood feast like no other.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw goes in search of Singapore's best vegetable dishes, kicking off with a traditional breakfast at Singapore Zoo, including kaya toast with half-cooked eggs and coffee.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren heads to the Cape Winelands, where he tastes a variety of local wines including Pinotage, a signature South African red, and Ratafia, a unique and complex fortified wine.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s next stop on his food trail is Tswalu Nature Reserve, in the heart of the Kalahari Desert. Warren then meets with acclaimed Chef Marnus to cook up some exciting South African delicacies.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren heads to the coastal city of Durban - where he’s staying at the iconic Oyster Box hotel.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: In Durban, Warren visits the famous restaurant Max’s Lifestyle for an indulgent Shisa Nyama experience, before meeting with local guide Thoko to visit a nearby Zulu village.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s next stop on his food trail is Kruger National Park, one of South Africa’s largest game reserves, where he’s staying at the renowned Sabi Sabi lodge.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: In the heart of the Kalahari Desert, Warren spots a myriad of African animals, and learns to make traditional rusks to go with his morning coffee.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw catches up with a cousin from his father's side of the family to learn how he has been making Hainanese chicken rice for over 30 years.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam learns to make authentic beef rendang from a local Muslim family. He visits the National Archives of Singapore to learn about his mother's family, and continues his search for inspiration for his Singapore banquet dinner.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam visits Peranakan food legend Violet Oon's restaurant, National Kitchen. He then heads to Chinatown to visit Aussie Dave Pynt's restaurant, Burnt Ends.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam goes in search of the best seafood that Singapore has to offer. His journey begins inside the Marina Bay Sands resort complex where many celebrity chefs have opened eateries.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his search for seafood inspiration by heading to the famous Newton Food Centre. He gives a masterclass on how to line up a seafood feast like no other.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw goes in search of Singapore's best vegetable dishes, kicking off with a traditional breakfast at Singapore Zoo, including kaya toast with half-cooked eggs and coffee.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: In this episode we explore why and how animals fight and reveal the ways in which they are programmed to survive at all costs.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s primate team prepare to welcome a new birth.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s vet team commences critical care to save the life of an endangered sea turtle snared on a fishing line, and after 3 years without tigers at the Zoo, the team stand by to welcome a new big cat.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: We follow Auckland Zoo’s bird team into the wilds of the Coromandel Ranges as they help to save native kiwi populations, It’s a feeding frenzy for the Tasmanian devils and the elephant team faces their biggest challenge yet.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, there's shocking news for the elephant team, the vets are concerned about one of their rescued Little penguins, and we find out how it really does take a community to feed the Zoo.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this engaging episode, Reilly shares his rhino release dream. It’s time for Judy’s beloved duiker to return to the wild. And, a routine nyala capture takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this episode, a warthog retrieval mission goes awry. Meet the matriarch of Imire, a wonderful elephant that has a unique story. It’s time to say farewell to the Imire family.

programme.title: Destination Myanmar
programme.desc: Destination Myanmar will take the audience to some of Myanmar's most beautiful and stunning Asian Heritage wetlands with fishermen paddling one-legged along shallow waters and floating gardens.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Meet the extraordinary miniature animals, who use their small size to survive against all odds in the world’s most deadly environments.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In the flipside of Trollhunters Ep. 222, Aja and Krel embark on a journey with Jim, Toby, and Claire, who Krel believes are the Zeron Brotherhood in disguise. Meanwhile, Aja’s missing Serrtaor embarks on a journey of its own.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Aja and Krel learn a secret, military base may house an alien spacecraft, they enlist Stuart to help them infilitrate it. Meanwhile, General Morando unviels his latest weapon - Omen, a deadly, cyborg assassin.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: During her last days on Earth, Aja decides to tell Steve the truth: she's an alien. But her plans are complicated when the Zerons abduct Aja, Steve and Krel. Meanwhile, Vex struggles with an impossible choice: saving the Royal teens or the Royal Cores.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When baby families are leaving town, Boss Baby and Tim battle to prove Bootsy is behind it all

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Mega Fat CEO Baby claims he has dirt that could get Boss Baby fired, Boss Baby and the team try to find a way to get it first!

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ton-Ton's friends, The 'Dumps, visit the Flatirons but are too wild and crazy for the crew, so the Dinotrux build a racetrack perfect for joyriding.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When D-Structs tricks the Gluphosaurs into attacking the Dinotrux, Revvit must befriend them and find a way to “unstick” the crew from one another.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Chet is determined to open a giant can of tomato juice lands in town and Turbo worries that Chet is becoming obsessed with the can. // Turbo donates his race winnings an animal charity, but accidentally adopts a toad who moves into the clubhouse and becomes an obnoxious house guest.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Smoove Move is embarrassed when his nerdy brother comes to visit.// Skidmark causes a panic when he hunts a snail-eating goldfish at a fancy party.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: 2500 Candles for Ra Upset that no one remembered his birthday, Ra goes to hang out with the mummies at the Deedstown museum. It's a Mad, Mad, Mad Underworld When Casper finds Cappy's old treasure map, he promises to help the pirate find his lost fortune.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Curse of the Sandwich After Ra accidentally bites into Thatch's sandwich, he becomes convinced that he's turning into a vampire. Real Little Monster When Norman the bully comes after Jimmy, Casper helps his human friend hide in the one place he knows Norman won't look—Scare School.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a coin purse with kitty coins, it's Store Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy help out at all the different stores (Cakey's Bakery, Baby Box's Craft Emporium, Kitty Fairy's Flower Shoppe) to earn kitty coins and save up for a melodicat at the Grand Opening of DJ Catnip’s Music Store!

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Marcus makes a Dew Drop-sized hot-air balloon for Phoebe and the Dews have a blast helping their kids from above, including secretly guiding Lola back to her family, before she accidentally follows Hip-Hop the frog out of the park. / Phoebe makes a pair of glasses for Bob the bird, but when seeing things clearly for the first time gets him lost, the Dews help Bob find his nest before his family arrives for a visit.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: The Dews think a double rainbow is making their powers change, but what they discover is that they are about to graduate to a new level of Dew Dropness, with the newfound ability to float in the air! / When Reed discovers he’s being assigned a family, he runs to tell Athena, only to find Athena and her house are missing! While Eden and Phoebe search for Athena, Reed’s on Dew Drop duty for Athena. After successfully helping Athena's kids, Reed is assigned the family in the apartment below Athena. He now gets to join them on more adventures.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Ranger Team Leader Mama Box helps Kitty Ranger Gabby and Pandy get a lost Baby Me-Owl back home to its Mama in the Fairy Tale Garden. They embark on a hiking adventure! They learn about animal tracking, earn patches along the way, and ultimately, reunite Baby with Mama!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy, and Carlita prepare for the annual Meow-Mazing Games, they encounter stiff competition from the Doodads and must work together to bring home the coveted dollhouse trophy.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman loses his first tooth, he fears he won't be Kate's baby anymore and goes on a city-wide chase to recover his tooth before Kate can replace him with a younger, cuter animal.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Ranger Hoof invites Marty on a Junior Ranger night trot in Central Park, Marty is determined to prove he's got what it takes to do the job- but when Alex tags along for the ride, Marty learns that "what it takes" is a whole lot of teamwork.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids have a race to decide who gets to try some extremely rare berries. / When Scallop finds a beautiful and mysterious sea sculpture, she enlists the help of her friends to search the sea for the artist behind the masterpiece.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie struggles to recreate an old tradition perfectly, the kids realize they can make their own traditions./ A story told by Chef J inspires Juniper to go in search of snow.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Based on PD Eastman's classic children’s book, Go, Dog. Go! Follows 6-year-old dog, Tag Barker, on her hilarious adventures in the city of Pawston, a fun-loving community of dogs on the go. Tag is a skilled mechanic and loves anything that goes. With her ingenuity and creativity, Tag can go as far as any plan will take her, always with her best friend, Scooch Pooch, by her side. Scooch’s easy-going nature is the perfect counterbalance to Tag’s high-octane energy. But as much as Tag loves to go, she’s often reminded that it's family, friends and neighbors that really fuel a community.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag and Scooch learn that Sandra Paws' sleigh broke down on a mountain, they have to go on an adventure to fix the sleigh and save Sniffs-mas! Meanwhile, Beans tries to get a grumpy Frank to feel the Sniffs-mas spirit.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Uncle King Julien abdicates his throne, handing off his crown to Prince Julien. Let the reign of King Julien the Thirteenth begin.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: King Julien learns that 99% of the lemurs love him, so he makes it his mission to find and convert his one "hater."

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: The evil genius Karl sets out to destroy King Julien. When both Clover and Maurice are captured, King Julien must save them from his new nemesis.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Exhausted from settling his subjects' disputes, King Julien replaces himself with a dummy king so he can play hooky, unwittingly sparking a rebellion.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Set on reclaiming his throne, Uncle King Julien convinces Julien to go into Foosa territory. Julien creates a disguise and forces Maurice to join him.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Grug and Ugga leave the kids alone on date night, Eep throws the first-ever house party that rages out of control and almost destroys the cave.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Eep has the first-ever sleepover, scary noises and shadows send the girls screaming out of the cave; Thunk saves the day when Bear Owls invade.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Grug takes Ugga hunting to find her inner growl again, she's as fierce as ever until coming face-to-face with a mom and baby too cute to catch.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When The Croods experience the first-ever sugar-rush, they're hooked on the delicious new food; Grug is labeled a zombie after taking the first nap.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods

programme.title: Puss in Boots: The Three Diablos

Puss must partner with the villain's henchmen, The Three Little Kittens, to seize the ruby. Babysitting has never been more dangerous. Will our hero Puss in Boots tame the Three Diablos in time to recover the ruby?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

Suffering under the new regime and without Mr. Krupp/Captain Underpants on hand to help, the boys hypnotize gym teacher Mr. Meaner and turn him into Sergeant Boxers to fight back.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: Shout At The Devil
programme.desc: During World War One, an English poacher, an American adventurer, and his attractive young daughter set out to destroy a German battle-cruiser awaiting repairs in an inlet just off Zanzibar.

programme.title: Tim
programme.desc: A somewhat mentally handicapped 20-year-old man works as a laborer, but everyone abuses his naiveté. A nice 40-year-old American woman hires him one day and they become close. However, the town and his family see her as predatory.

programme.title: Mulholland Dr.
programme.desc: A hopeful actress in Los Angeles befriends an amnesiac woman, and as they search for her identity, reality and illusion blur in a dreamlike thriller about ambition, identity, and Hollywood's dark side.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It’s Sudden Death!

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived years later as cyborg super-soldiers. But when memories return, they break free—setting up a brutal showdown between former comrades.

programme.title: Pandemic Part 1
programme.desc: When a deadly new strain of an unknown virus infects a plane on it's way to Los Angeles, CDC Dr. Kayla Martin and her team must battle political obstacles, conspiracy theorists, and an escape of the quarantined survivors.

programme.title: Pandemic Part 2
programme.desc: When a deadly new strain of an unknown virus infects a plane on it's way to Los Angeles, CDC Dr. Kayla Martin and her team must battle political obstacles, conspiracy theorists, and an escape of the quarantined survivors.

programme.title: Rambo 3
programme.desc: Combat has taken its toll on Rambo, but he’s finally begun to find inner peace in a monastery. When Rambo’s friend and mentor Col. Trautman asks for his help on a top secret mission to Afghanistan, Rambo declines but must reconsider when Trautman is captured.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: In Wanted, a slacker is recruited by a secret assassin fraternity, uncovering hidden powers and dark truths as he trains under elite killers, including Angelina Jolie and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it’s a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It’s Sudden Death!

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Filipino actor, model and swimmer Enchong Dee and his celebrity friend Ria, to explore the highs and lows of Hong Kong. They are eager to push their boundaries in this thrilling new adventure.

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian and seek evidence against his gang. After their release, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, as Shan cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Wu Lin: The Society
programme.desc: Set in a dystopian 2050, two detectives investigate a string of mysterious murders in a world choked by pollution and pandemics. They soon discover a sinister cult and a deadly ninja assassin behind the carnage, forcing them into a desperate battle to save what remains of society.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Agent of Death
programme.desc: After undergoing a secret government experiment, CIA operative Tara gains the ability to shapeshift into anyone through DNA transformation, making her the ultimate infiltrator. When her father is murdered and evidence points to her own agency, she is forced to go rogue. Now, she must stop stolen uranium from triggering a global nuclear catastrophe.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah cooks a dish inspired by American meatloaf, blending the recipe with an English-style Wellington. She adds a Southern favourite, sorghum mustard, and prepares smothered potatoes.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Racheal teams up with her friend, chef and author, Anna Gass, to make an Italian version of fried grilled cheese, also known as a carrozza, along with a hearty roasted tomato soup.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: When a horrible tragedy befalls someone close to her, Theresa continues to deliver messages while experiencing her own grief. Things get intense when the victim of tragedy makes himself known to Theresa.

programme.title: Abducted In The Everglades
programme.desc: When her student daughter goes missing while on Spring Break down in Miami, Beverly flies out from Indiana to find her, acquiring the assistance of boatman Ray as they search the vast Everglades.

programme.title: My Father's Murder In Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George soon ends up murdered. Now Allie must uncover long-kept family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Anthony is trying to move on from his troubled past, but his huge thigh lump is holding him back. Mary has a mysterious 70-year-old bump that amazes Drs. Lee and Tomassian.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Dr. Lyndsey joins Dr. Lee to help David, who is fearful that the lump on his jaw might be cancerous. Carla has a mysterious, large bulge on her thigh that concerns Dr. Lee.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Tune is as host Michael Yo takes us to places set to satisfy the palate, while also challenging our ideas of a dining experience. Our first stop is a sushi-bar and game-show joint in New York City.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Join Michael Yo as he circles the world for meals that can't, won't and don't stop. Take a ride in a speedy elevator up a thousand feet to the highest revolving restaurant in Canada.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a classic German dish of smothered chicken meatballs and spaetzle, inspired by the traditional Southern meal of chicken and dumplings.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: After dining at a local restaurant, Rachael decides to create her own version of their special dish: Wild Boar Ragu served over Kale Pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael makes her version of squid ink pasta, prepared with fresh, local calamari, and served on a bed of "tuxedo pasta."

programme.title: Secret Life Of The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Angie, the wife of a charismatic pastor who extols family values yet maintains an icy demeanour toward his own, seeks solace from her marital woes in the arms of her recently hired pool boy.

programme.title: Trapped In Her Dorm Room
programme.desc: When a classmate's adoration turns into a dangerous obsession, college student Erin finds herself held captive in her own dorm room during Spring Break.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: An overextended Dolmar and his team take on a botched flip. But when delays plague the timeline, he recruits his wife Keisha to help manage the project and sees dollar signs as local house prices soar.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Forty of the country’s best home cooks are ready to show the judges what they’ve got. Tonight, twenty have 90 minutes to cook their dream dish in order to win one of the ten aprons on offer.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Another twenty home cooks enter the MasterChef kitchen to make their dream dishes. For those who miss out, there will be one final chance to compete for the last four aprons tomorrow.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Following two days of auditions, the twenty remaining hopefuls have a second and final chance to cook their way into the competition. Just who will score themselves one of the last four places?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: Aussie Rock legend Jimmy Barnes and wife Jane set this season’s first mystery box, inspiring the Top 24 competitors with seasonal ingredients they love to cook with from their garden.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: In the first elimination round of the competition, twenty-three cooks will show the judges a window into their home life through a favourite dish that they like to cook for their loved ones.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S2)

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)
programme.desc: From explosions that eviscerate entire forests, to lakes that explode with lethal gas, to earthquakes that could have been triggered by humans, are some of Earth’s deadliest catastrophes truly unnatural?

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: From the Johnstown flood to the Indonesian tsunami, discover how water’s power can transform into an unstoppable agent of death.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1)
programme.desc: Remember when childhood came with a side of danger? Think back to the outrageous toys and daredevil playground antics that once defined growing up, as we uncover explosive science kits and more.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: When a seller whips into the shop with an 'Energy Dome' hat made for the band DEVO, will Rick's offer top the charts? Then, Corey takes a shot at a decanter set that supposedly belonged to Buffalo Bill.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S5)
programme.desc: As the team performs a massive, multi-focused experiment, they complete an operation that may reveal the ultimate answers on Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: American cars get a makeover when an engineer creates the first sports car. And Detroit's Big 3 begin transforming their functional, practical cars into American sports cars.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S1)
programme.desc: Relics from the crucifixion of Jesus Christ have fascinated the faithful for 2000 years—from the wooden cross and iron nails to the crown of thorns. But do these sacred artefacts still exist?

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Deep beneath the sands of Egypt lie 24 enormous sarcophagi—and every one of them is empty. What purpose might these giant tombs have served? And is it possible that they were designed by alien visitors?

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a daring prison break frees hundreds of Union soldiers. When he was captured and sent to Libby Prison in Richmond, Virginia, he engineered one of the greatest mass escapes in history.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: In Arizona, Mike relives the thrill of speedway history thanks to a motorbike-loving family of adrenaline junkies and their garage full of one-of-a-kind racing mementos.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)
programme.desc: From colossal walls and giant stone tombs to temples carved from solid rock, how did ancient civilisations achieve feats of engineering that still defy modern understanding?

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: As pressure mounts in the swamp, Troy and Pickle risk their lives in the oil fields. Joey and Zak attempt to knock Mr Daniel off his throne, but the Edgar Patriarch refuses to go down without a fight.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: While digging a massive steel shaft in the Money Pit area, the Lagina brothers and their team make a discovery that could help prove the legends about buried treasure to be true.

programme.desc: Did a Bermuda Triangle tsunami claim two behemoth ships, or did they fall prey to Nazi U-Boats? The team sets its sights on a famous Bermuda Triangle case: the twin vanishings of two massive cargo ships.

programme.title: Lion VS Lion
programme.desc: The traditional lion dance has never looked so good as in Lion VS Lion which captures the most impressive sequences of lion dancing on film. Besides being loaded with enjoyable martial arts chicanery, film historians can revel because it's also the first film that clearly demonstrates the intricacies and differences between the traditional Northern and Southern lion dancing techniques. The Five Venom alumnus and Chang Cheh discovery, Lo Meng, teams up with Liu Chia-liang protege Wang Yu, as they inadvertently turn from vagabond kung-fu school operators into anti-Ching, patriotic fighters.

programme.title: Band Four
programme.desc: An aspiring singer of an indie band called Band Four reunites with her estranged guitarist father following the death of her mother. Together with her half-sister and her nine-year-old son, the newly reunited family come together to support each other through their love and passion for music.

programme.title: Duel Of Fist
programme.desc: Fan Ke discovers at his father’s deathbed that he has a half-brother, Wenlie, in Thailand. He goes to find Wenlie, who became a boxer to support his sick mother. Following their encounter, the two got involved in the underworld of boxing match gambling.

programme.title: My Blue Summer
programme.desc: Zhi has been secretly in love with Nan since she met him once as a child. After graduating high school, Zhi realizes that she and Nan are in the same university, where they get to know each other by chance and become close friends. However, Zhi is still too shy to express her love for Nan. Will this long-term crush finally turn into true love?

programme.title: Heaven Sword and Dragon Sabre 2
programme.desc: Only by bringing together the powerful Heaven Sword and the mighty Dragon Sabre can six martial arts sects struggling for supremacy be saved in this thrilling sequel to Chu Yuan's original hit.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: The Locksmith
programme.desc: Locksmith Master Shan suffers from dementia and passes on his skills to Hao Ren, who surpasses him. Detective Liu often seeks Hao Ren's help and they become good friends. When Hao Ren reunites with an old friend one day, he accidentally unfolds the truth behind Shan's wife's disappearance, leading to a chain of mysterious events.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Ling Hsiao and Kuan Wang Lung are two guard chiefs working for an old convoy master. Lung is secretly in love with Fang Yen, the master’s granddaughter but Yen is attracted to Ling Hsiao instead. In order to win her back, Lung sets up a trap to steal the convoy and frames Ling Hsiao for it.

programme.title: Fist to Fist
programme.desc: While tracking a powerful drug syndicate, narcotics officer He Guang Chen is ambushed by masked raiders and pushed to the brink. As the truth unfolds, he discovers the mastermind is his former police academy friend. Betrayal cuts deep as he faces a brutal choice between duty and loyalty in a relentless fight for justice.

programme.title: The Tigress Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Sam is being hunted as he discovers that the mayor and the chief of medical bureau are colluding with a drug dealer. He is saved by a fishermen family and works in their friend’s grocery but the grocery owner is killed when the enemies track Sam down. Sam escapes to Shaolin to learn the cudgel style of kung fu in order to avenge his friends.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Feng, a homeless man, is wrongly accused of robbery and subsequently arrested and imprisoned. The actual bandit bribes fellow inmate Yang, a pickpocket, to kill Feng. Aware of Feng's innocence, Yang resolves to help him escape from prison. However, their escape attempt goes awry, and both find themselves facing the grim reality of death row.

programme.title: Come Back Home
programme.desc: In a chilly winter, De and his family goes on a self-drive tour to Changbai Mountain. The holiday turns tragic when De’s eight-year-old son goes missing. He seeks help from the local police but is unable to find his son. Though the golden hour has passed, De and the rescue team insist on continuing the search. Can they finally rescue the boy?

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: Shaolin Mantis
programme.desc: The Emperor orders Feng to find proofs of Master Tian’s rebellion in his house. Feng falls in love with Tian’s granddaughter and marries her. When he finds the proofs and tries to leave with her, his wife is killed in the fight against Tian. Feng creates the mantis-style martial arts and vows to avenge her death.

programme.title: The Flag of Iron
programme.desc: When super director Chang Cheh found new talent and blood with "The Five Venoms" actors, most of which were trained in the highly acrobatic Chinese opera and well versed with exotic martial arts weapons, this created a new spark for his use of bizarre weapons in his films. The Flag Of Iron is one of 20 movies that he directed featuring the utterly flabbergasting and physically exhausting action bits created by these five dudes. You have the good guys from the righteous clan versus the bad guys from the villainous clan and it's so filled with "don't-blink-or-you-will-miss-something" gags, you will need to watch it over and over again so you can see the things you missed.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Asia Insight
programme.desc: In recent years, young entrepreneurs have flocked from all over China to Liangzhu, an area that has become known for AI-based business development, searching for newfound freedom and opportunities.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Highly respected sports trainer Kitani Masashi works with world-class soccer players, relieving fatigue, pain, and conditioning the body to be less prone to injury. He talks about his unique methods.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change The World
programme.desc: With about 28 times the warming effect of CO2, methane lies in an ice-like form beneath the seabed. Rising sea temperatures dissociates it, releasing methane gas. How do we stop this time bomb?

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: Mt. Fuji's Faces
programme.desc: We observe "Red Fuji" and "Black Fuji," 2 dramatically different views of Japan's most famous mountain, captured by the artist Hokusai. What did Mount Fuji mean to the people of Edo?

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: Once kidney function is lost, it cannot be restored. If CKD progresses, the only options are dialysis or transplantation. We provide the latest information on maintaining kidney health.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen Diary
programme.desc: The Kogawas take us on a tasty journey with traditional recipes from the mountainous region of Hida. This time, they weather the heat of the summer season with dishes steeped into Buddhist tradition.

programme.title: License To Wed
programme.desc: A reverend (Williams) puts an engaged couple (Moore and Krasinski) through a grueling marriage preparation course to see if they are meant to be married in his church.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 9
programme.desc: See these incredible brushes with disaster, close calls and near-death events avoided by split-second decisions that change the course of fate.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 1
programme.desc: Police takedowns can be risky business when criminals are armed and dangerous. That's why officers rely on non-lethal tactics like tasers, bean bag rounds and K-9 units to subdue suspects.

programme.title: Smallville S2 9
programme.desc: When Clark tries to warn Lana and Chloe about an overachieving student who is surreptitiously dating both girls, they accuse Clark of jealousy.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 09
programme.desc: Officers Mack and Jack come to the rescue of a perp who has a tough time being alone, and Kevin reunites with his long-time friend Candace Bailey in a hacksperiment where they attempt to find out the sex of her baby.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 10
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin meet their toughest challenge yet when they use hacks to game a polygraph test, and it gets hot and heavy in the OR when Dr. Hack meets the fiery new CEO. Plus, Kevin learns how to defend himself with a smartphone.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 6
programme.desc: Watch your back! TruTV is counting down the 20 dumbest pranksters on the planet! They're gluing phones to faces, faking pregnancies, and pranking the ultimate April Fool! Totally in on the joke is our hilarious cast of comedians, including Chris Fairbanks, Gilbert Gottfried, Kevin McCaffrey, and Judy Gold.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 9
programme.desc: See these incredible brushes with disaster, close calls and near-death events avoided by split-second decisions that change the course of fate.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 1
programme.desc: Police takedowns can be risky business when criminals are armed and dangerous. That's why officers rely on non-lethal tactics like tasers, bean bag rounds and K-9 units to subdue suspects.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 13
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode! They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two part punishment!

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 01
programme.desc: Gather 'round for a most hackful holiday celebration, as Brooke and Kevin demonstrate how to navigate any holiday office party like a pro Elf, and explain how the ball drop became a New Year's tradition.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 02
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke hack their way through the worst obstacles an airport has to offer, and viewers share their DIY solutions for whipping up cream. Plus, Brooke and Kevin find out how low prices can go if you're a "good guy."

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 03
programme.desc: Skip a trip to the spa with a facial hack you can find in any schoolkid's book bag, and learn how to treat yourself like it's your birthday - any day of the year. Plus, Brooke and Kevin go for a swim… in a garbage bag.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 04
programme.desc: Señor Solución discovers a hack that gets him back in the mood, and Kevin and Brooke reveal fan hacks for cooling down a hot bed. Plus, get revenge on rigged arcades with hacks to make the claw machine cough up a sweet prize.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 05
programme.desc: Officers Mack and Jack crash a failed football-viewing party, Kevin and Brooke use an important hacker's tool to secure a restaurant reservation, and it's mom versus dad in a race to determine peanut butter & jelly supremacy.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 06
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin demonstrate how to save money at the gas tank. Plus, breaking up doesn't have to be so hard when you use these lessons from our Hack Hero!

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 07
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin give tips on skipping a busy lunch line with a new Gaming the System hack, the Pitchman has some money-saving advice for your car, and ever wonder where high heels come from? Find out in Hacks From History.

programme.title: Friends S7 7
programme.desc: Ross discovers that his dissertation is in a section of the library where students go to have sex.Chandler's ex-girlfriend Janice manipulates Monica and Chandler into inviting her the wedding.Rachel and Phoebe meddle in Joey's relationship with Erin.

programme.title: Friends S7 8
programme.desc: Chandler's irrational fear of dogs causes problems when Phoebe brings home a cute canine. Rachel's assistant gives her a Thanksgiving surprise--a kiss.

programme.title: Friends S7 9
programme.desc: Monica becomes popular with her neighbors because of her homemade candy. Phoebe decides to learn to ride a bicycle. Rachel gets into trouble for dating her assistant.

programme.title: Friends S7 10
programme.desc: Ross dresses up as the Holiday Armadillo and, with Monica, Chandler and Joey's help, teaches Ben about Chanukah. Phoebe worries that Rachel prefers living with Joey.

programme.title: Friends S7 11
programme.desc: Chandler and Rachel can't help eating the irresistible cheesecakes intended for a neighbor. Phoebe's former boyfriend returns for one night only, but Joey could ruin the romance. Monica plots revenge on her cousin's wedding day.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 4
programme.desc: Raj's honesty about his past comes back to bite him after his girlfriend, Emily, gives Penny the cold shoulder. Meanwhile, the guys consider becoming part-owners in Stuart's comic-book store.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 5
programme.desc: With the girls away in Vegas for the weekend, the guys try to invent "the next big thing", but only come up with new ways to procrastinate.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 6
programme.desc: Sheldon and Raj test whether they could survive a dark-matter research expedition in a salt mine by simulating the conditions in a steam tunnel deep underground.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 7
programme.desc: The guys try to help Penny out of an awkward work dilemma, when a smitten doctor shows up at her door after her flirtatious sales techniques work a little too well.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 8
programme.desc: When the gang recreates a high-school prom night on the roof of the guys' apartment building, Sheldon feels pressure to participate in all the typical romantic traditions.

programme.title: Gran Torino
programme.desc: Retired auto worker, Korean War veteran and widower Walt Kowalski (Clint Eastwood) sets out to reform his neighbor, a young Hmong teenager, who tried to steal Kowalski's prized possession: a 1972 Ford Gran Torino he keeps in mint condition.

programme.title: Cry Macho
programme.desc: A former rodeo star and washed-up horse breeder goes on a redemptive journey to Mexico to retrieve his ex-boss' son in this moving drama.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: Overworked Sandra Bullock has had enough of being millionaire Hugh Grant's lawyer, and she's about to quit!

programme.title: Jack the Giant Slayer
programme.desc: Bryan Singer supersizes the "Jack and the Beanstalk" legend in this epic action twist on a classic tale, starring Nicholas Hoult, Stanley Tucci, Bill Nighy, Ewan McGregor, Ian McShane and more. When a young farmhand unwittingly opens a gateway between our world and a fearsome race of giants, an ancient war is reignited. Unleashed upon the Earth, the marauding giants strive to reclaim the land they once lost, forcing Jack into the battle of his life to stop them. Fighting for a kingdom and its people -- and the love of a princess, of course -- he comes face to face with the legendary goliaths and, in the process, become a legend himself.

programme.title: The Invasion
programme.desc: As a Washington psychiatrist unearths the origin of an alien epidemic, she also discovers her son might be the only way it can be stopped.

programme.title: Cellular
programme.desc: A random wrong number on his cell phone sends a young man into a world of deception and murder.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 2)
programme.desc: When a Marine captain shows up at Camp Pendleton exhibiting symptoms of a fatal virus, NIS goes on lockdown and Gibbs is forced to take charge. As panic spreads, the team races to determine whether it really is a deadly outbreak or something else.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35)
programme.desc: Teams continue racing in Vietnam and face the hustle and bustle of a congested Vietnamese market, where they must properly set up a fish stand and deliver mattresses to a local hotel.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: While out in the city, Nolan and Bailey witness a murder in public and immediately spring into action in the hopes of finding the person responsible. Meanwhile, Angela and Wesley have a big life decision that may affect their future.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 1)
programme.desc: Things turn deadly when elite matchmaker Margo Clarke goes to extreme lengths to keep her socialite client from finding out the truth about her perfect new husband.

programme.title: Long Bright River (Season 1)
programme.desc: Mickey and Truman grow closer as they follow their new lead. A new victim complicates the case of the murdered women and raises the stakes in the hunt to find Kacey as Mickey reckons with her past choices.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 1)
programme.desc: When Tess (Dolly Lewis) inserts herself into Jake's (Daniel Gillies) investigation to find the identity of a dead John Doe, she confronts conflicting emotions - fearing for her brother Lucas' (Alec Santos) life while driven to do the thing she loves most: solve the case.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 1)
programme.desc: Jake (Daniel Gillies) encourages Tess (Dolly Lewis) to talk to Superintendent Bennett (Roger Cross) about getting her old job back, but her hopes are cut short by his disappointing offer to join the Metro PD only to ride a desk.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 1)
programme.desc: After the shocking developments in the Sandman case, the team works with the FBI to investigate further. While Wheeler struggles to hold onto his job, his family reaches a crisis point.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 1)
programme.desc: When the murder of Pedro Hernandez is unearthed, Gibbs faces a reckoning. But when he needs his team most, the loyalty of one is brought into question

programme.title: Anaconda (2025)

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 6)
programme.desc: It’s Officer Aaron Thorsen’s first day back since the assault, and he’s tasked with a series of high-stress cases to determine whether he’s ready to work. Elsewhere, the team investigates a homicide case with a potential tie to the pentagram killer.

programme.title: Coroner (Season 2)
programme.desc: As Jenny investigates a devastating fire in a low-income apartment building, she connects with a woman who has lost everything.

programme.desc: Amy grapples with having memories while treating a mother-to-be with a mysterious condition. Also, Dr. Joan Ridley, Amy's mentor, visits Westside.

programme.title: Malee
programme.desc: When four best friends reunite for a funeral at an ancient estate, a reckless act with a cursed Manohra dancer's headdress awakens a vengeful spirit that begins to haunt and follow them relentlessly. As paranormal phenomena escalate, they are forced to confront the estate's dark secrets in a desperate struggle for survival.

programme.title: The Possession of Leah Dela Cruz
programme.desc: A female police officer relocates to a quiet small town and is drawn into a chilling case involving a girl seemingly possessed by an evil spirit. As her investigation deepens, unsettling truths emerge. She soon realises this is not just an exorcism, but a psychological battle that uncovers the town’s dark secrets.

programme.title: A Sealed Book
programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: The Ghost Writer
programme.desc: A struggling writer must write a hit novel to save his career. He retreats to his childhood home where his father, also a successful writer, died mysteriously. Upon discovering his father's final manuscript, he realizes it's far superior to anything he could create. He decides to plagiarize the work, setting off a series of horrifying events.

programme.desc: When beautiful Jalajhia Finklea vanished the day before her 18th birthday, her Wampanoag Tribe members immediately took action.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S3)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. In Vegas, a man gets naked on top of a poker table; a mom fires multiple rounds at a police station.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S3)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a woman poops in the middle of the road during a traffic stop; a fugitive gets stuck in a chimney while hiding from police.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: On his last day as an undercover agent, Bergen County Detective Carlos James experiences his first shootout, and ATF Agent Jenn Eskew poses as a hitwoman to investigate a possible murder for hire.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: After learning his partner was stealing, enduring heart surgery, and facing other hardships, Bob withdrew into his 7,000-sq-ft Victorian mansion, filling it with antiques.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: When Pam Shelly, 31, is found in her Cuero, Texas, bathroom with a fatal gunshot wound to the head, her death is initially ruled a suicide.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: The quiet suburb of Haddon Township is turned upside down when a toddler goes missing. Residents band together to search local streets and help detectives reveal an unlikely murderer.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: Spring Valley's Haitian community is rocked when a civic leader is murdered. It takes police nearly two decades to sift through the rumours and solve a mystery filled with lies and dark secrets.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An angry defendant flips off the judge during a virtual hearing; a victim is cross-examined by her accused attacker; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An accused stalker screams expletives at the judge; a shooting victim's mother cries for justice; an assistant prosecutor argues with the judge; and more.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S3)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a man dressed as a chicken claims to be tripping on mushrooms; a woman attempts to use a police car as her taxi to the bar.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S3)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a naked man shows up unexpectedly on a homeowner’s doorstep; a jeweller locks a woman in a vault to wait for police to arrive.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers (S9)
programme.desc: It's a wild Alaska summer day as troopers locate a naked wolf hunter, track a suspected felon through the woods, and respond to an animal hoarder in a remote village just north of the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Crime In Progress
programme.desc: When officers in suburban Indiana respond to a potential kidnapping and murder scene, body cam captures every tense moment of the standoff with the suspect.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Nanny Yoselyn Ortega had been looking after Kevin and Marina's three children. One day, plagued by psychotic thoughts and hearing voices, she snapped, with devastating consequences for two tiny lives.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: In the sunny cities of Daytona and Cocoa, ATF Special Agent Perala is reminded of the importance of listening to your gut. His life is threatened when suspects turn the tables on him.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers (S9)
programme.desc: It's a wild Alaska summer day as troopers locate a naked wolf hunter, track a suspected felon through the woods, and respond to an animal hoarder in a remote village just north of the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: 2G
programme.desc: Agadez, 2021. Ibrahim, Abdelsalam, Daouda and El Bak set off on a journey across the Sahara to reach dozens of gold miners lost in the middle of the desert. Between hope and disillusionment, these men struggle to survive in an increasingly hostile and unstable environment.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Hasni Bekheira grew up in Grenoble, in the Teisseire neighborhood, where he learned hairdressing at a very young age. Without a diploma but driven by passion, he created Street Coiff. The principle: a chair, clippers and free haircuts for homeless people or detainees. Today recognized, he is proud of this tool of dignity and dialogue.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Skate Le Monde
programme.desc: Mathieu Cyr visits Italy, a key destination for all lovers of history and gastronomy. Meeting the country's enthusiastic and friendly skaters, from town to town he discovers a vibrant and welcoming skateboarding scene.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Chateau !
programme.desc: In turn, a medieval fortress, royal residence or sumptuous prison, Amboise Castle is quite unique. Leonardo da Vinci even wanted to be buried there! Troussay is the smallest castle in the Loire Valley. Protecting heritage is at the heart of its concerns.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes
programme.desc: Invasive plants threaten the region's ecosystem. In private homes, chickens are making a comeback, with more and more households having henhouses. Finally, is it possible to swim in the Seine in Normandy?

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'Actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans ca
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: C'Est Mathematique ! Avec Iman
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Mission Heros
programme.desc: At 8 years old, Amir leads the life of an everyday superhero. Thanks to his online avatar, he raises awareness among the children who watch him and throughout his neighborhood about civility and citizenship.

programme.title: Belfort & Lupin
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: Liam
programme.desc: At the science fair, the competition begins. Rafaele infiltrates it to speak with Helene about Liam's sudden increase in energy consumption. The android must remain hidden, but he wants to discover the real world.

programme.title: Foot Go
programme.desc: Eight year-old Tata arrives in a new school. She wants to join its football team but isn't allowed to; after all she's a girl! Refusing to be beaten, Tata decides to set up her own girls' team with the help of her gang of friends.

programme.title: Marocains Du Ciel
programme.desc: The students of the school set a trap for Touria: they slash the tires of her father's car to delay her.

programme.title: Matiere Grise
programme.desc: The magazine programme which takes the mystery out of science, encouraging us to think... without all the brain work!

programme.title: Sans Detours
programme.desc: Meeting Danny Khezzar and his older sister Angelina. We discover how the eldest encouraged her younger brother to persevere in cooking when he wanted to break into music. During a walk, their conversation unfolds and gives way to emotions...

programme.title: Le Beau Velo De Ravel
programme.desc: A bike journey, presented by Adrien Joveneau, along the entire RAVeL network, an independent cycle path network in Wallonia. With each programme, the presenter tells us of a stage in his journey and talks about mobility and tourist resources in the region.

programme.title: Stoemp, Peket... Et Des Rawettes
programme.desc: A veritable celebration of Belgium's regions, along with the locals who live there, their regional languages... and their humour!

programme.title: La Belle Vie
programme.desc: Julien sets off to visit Jean-Luc Kanape living in the land of his ancestors, where he has built a small off-grid cabin. Guardian of this territory of the caribou, he shares with Julien his love of the forest and of handing down the ancestral knowledge of the Innu.

programme.title: Au Bonheur Des Livres
programme.desc: Around a chosen theme, Claire Chazal welcomes two authors: novelists, biographers, essayists or historians, and shares viewers' literary favorites.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: A journalist, author and podcaster, Nawal was born in Tunis. Of Amazigh origin, she was raised by a Franco-Algerian couple in the Paris region. Drawing on her lived experience and investigations, she deconstructs negrophobia and unspoken racial issues within North African diasporas, notably in her podcast ''Is That a Thing Among Us?''

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match
programme.desc: A former high-level volleyball player, she is now the coach of AS Monaco volleyball: Eva Hamzaoui is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: In Paris, Richard Orlinski meets Jerome Valton, a visual artist and screen printer who draws inspiration from pedological patterns and cartography. A Swiss artist based in Berlin since 2012, Rylsee is influenced by hip-hop culture and urban art. He has established himself with a black-and-white graphic style, combining letters and shapes.

programme.title: Championnat Du Monde D'Endurance Wec 2026
programme.desc: Major moments from the WEC World Endurance Championship events.

programme.title: La Fievre Des Festivals
programme.desc: The final preparations before the start of a festival are always hectic. The teams may be a bit rusty but everyone eventually gets into high gear. Despite years of experience, organizers often feel that they won't be ready for the kick-off.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: Along with event curator Alexandre Samson, we look back at the ''1997 Fashion Big Bang'' exhibition at Paris's Musee Galliera. Discover the history of the lucky ladybird. Spotlight on candlemaking: the former royal manufactory, the house of Trudon celebrates its 380th anniversary. How should you wear a cape?

programme.title: La Cuisine D'Isabelle Et Ricardo
programme.desc: Isabelle invites her colleague Jonathan Rassi to prepare stracciatella topped with peas, pecans, and mustard greens. A fresh, springtime dish.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: A Boire Et A Manger
programme.desc: We join Lindsay Brun, Remi-Pierre Paquin and Vanessa Pilonin in the fabulous gardens of the Laurentians, ready to welcome radio presenters Penelope McQuade and Philippe Fehmiu. Together they prepare a mousseline with garlic confit and a smooth and creamy barley risotto.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: La Fete De La Chanson Francaise : 20 Ans D'emotions
programme.desc: Celebrating 20 years of ''La Fete de la chanson francaise''. Today's leading artists come together to sing and pay tribute to those who are no longer with us: Francoise Hardy, Johnny Hallyday, Charles Aznavour, Michel Delpech, etc.

programme.title: Le Village Des Endormis
programme.desc: As a murderer, Lucas, manages to escape during a prison transfer, a strange phenomenon turns life upside down in a village: one after another the locals fall into a long sleep. Martin, police captain on the verge of divorce, has to find Lucas amidst an overwhelming climate of collective panic.

programme.title: Pingouin Et Goeland Et Leurs 500 Petits
programme.desc: The story of an extraordinary couple. Daughter of deportees, the mother of director Michel Leclerc is taken in at the Sevres children's home in Hauts-de-Seine, an institution run by Roger and Yvonne Hagnauer, a couple of anti-Nazi pacifists whom everyone nicknamed ''Penguin'' and ''Seagull''.
